title: Garbage
body:
# Garbage - The Ultimate Item Disposal Solution

## Overview
Garbage is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft server plugin that offers players a seamless way to dispose of unwanted items. With a simple command, players can access a dedicated disposal inventory where items are permanently deleted upon closing, keeping server inventories clean and organized.

## Key Features

### 📦 Simple Item Disposal
Players can easily open a disposal inventory using `/garbage`, `/trash`, or `/dispose` commands. Any items placed in this inventory are permanently deleted when closed, providing a quick and efficient way to clean up inventories.

### 🎮 User-Friendly Experience
The plugin offers an intuitive interface that requires minimal interaction—just drop items and close the inventory. Perfect for both new and experienced players who want to keep their inventories organized without complicated processes.

### 🛠️ Fully Customizable
Server administrators have complete control over:
- Inventory size (9-54 slots)
- Custom inventory title with color codes
- All plugin messages
- Permission settings
- Sound and particle effects

### 🎭 Immersive Effects
Enhance the disposal experience with:
- Configurable sound effects when disposing items
- Custom particle animations
- Visual feedback that makes item disposal satisfying

### 🔒 Permission Control
Implement fine-grained access control with customizable permissions:
- `garbage.use` - Allows players to use the garbage command
- `garbage.admin` - Provides access to administrative features

### ⚡ Lightweight Performance
Optimized code ensures minimal server impact:
- No database requirements
- Negligible memory footprint
- Zero tick impact on server performance

### 📱 Command Aliases
Multiple command options for player convenience:
- `/garbage` - Primary command
- `/trash` - Alternative command
- `/dispose` - Alternative command

## Why Choose This Plugin?

### For Players
- Eliminates the need to find lava or cacti to dispose of items
- Prevents accidental item loss compared to dropping items on the ground
- Simple command that's easy to remember
- Satisfying visual and audio feedback

### For Server Owners
- Reduces entity count from dropped items, improving server performance
- Prevents item entity lag from players disposing items in the world
- Easy setup with no dependencies
- Fully configurable to match your server's theme

### For Developers
- Clean, well-documented code
- Easy to extend with your own features
- Open architecture for integration with other plugins

## Technical Specifications
- **API Version:** 1.20+ (compatible with all modern Minecraft versions)
- **Dependencies:** None
- **Permissions:** Customizable, defaulting to allowed for all players
- **Commands:** `/garbage`, `/trash`, `/dispose`
- **Configuration:** Full control over all aspects via config.yml

Garbage provides the perfect balance between simplicity and functionality, making it an essential quality-of-life improvement for any Minecraft server. Whether you're running a survival, creative, or minigame server, this plugin offers a professional solution for inventory management that both players and administrators will appreciate.
